pcks_pks_kms module

Production Security Management GUI Features: - Secure ECU Update Management - Production Key Server (SOAP) Integration with WS-Security - HSM (PKCS#11) Integration for Key Operations - VIN-to-Key Binding and Tracking - Audit Logging and Reporting

class pcks_pks_kms.ECUConfig(ecu_type: str, part_number: str, hardware_version: str, software_version: str, security_level: int, requires_secure_boot: bool, requires_key_injection: bool)[source]

Bases: object

ECU configuration for production

ecu_type: str
part_number: str
hardware_version: str
software_version: str
security_level: int
requires_secure_boot: bool
requires_key_injection: bool
__init__(ecu_type: str, part_number: str, hardware_version: str, software_version: str, security_level: int, requires_secure_boot: bool, requires_key_injection: bool) → None
class pcks_pks_kms.ProductionOrder(vin: str, model: str, production_date: datetime, ecus: List[Dict[str, Any]], status: str = 'pending')[source]

Bases: object

Production order for a vehicle

vin: str
model: str
production_date: datetime
ecus: List[Dict[str, Any]]
status: str = 'pending'
__init__(vin: str, model: str, production_date: datetime, ecus: List[Dict[str, Any]], status: str = 'pending') → None
class pcks_pks_kms.KeyInjectionRecord(vin: str, ecu_id: str, key_type: str, key_id: str, injection_time: datetime, operator: str, status: str, signature: str | None = None)[source]

Bases: object

Record of key injection event

vin: str
ecu_id: str
key_type: str
key_id: str
injection_time: datetime
operator: str
status: str
signature: str | None = None
__init__(vin: str, ecu_id: str, key_type: str, key_id: str, injection_time: datetime, operator: str, status: str, signature: str | None = None) → None
class pcks_pks_kms.HSMManager(pkcs11_lib_path: str, slot: int = 0, pin: str = None)[source]

Bases: object

Hardware Security Module (HSM) manager using PKCS#11 Supports key generation, signing, and secure storage

__init__(pkcs11_lib_path: str, slot: int = 0, pin: str = None)[source]

Initialize HSM connection

Parameters:

  • pkcs11_lib_path – Path to PKCS#11 library (.dll, .so, .dylib)

  • slot – HSM slot number

  • pin – User PIN for HSM access

connect() → bool[source]

Establish connection to HSM

disconnect()[source]

Close HSM session

generate_key_pair(key_label: str, key_type: str = 'RSA', key_size: int = 2048) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Generate key pair in HSM

Returns:

Dictionary with key handles and metadata

sign_data(key_label: str, data: bytes, mechanism: Mechanism = <Mechanism.SHA256_RSA_PKCS>) → bytes[source]

Sign data using private key from HSM

get_public_key(key_label: str) → bytes[source]

Retrieve public key from HSM

class pcks_pks_kms.ProductionKeyServerClient(wsdl_url: str, client_cert_path: str, client_key_path: str, ca_cert_path: str = None)[source]

Bases: object

Client for Production Key Server using SOAP with WS-Security Handles mutual TLS authentication and XML signature

__init__(wsdl_url: str, client_cert_path: str, client_key_path: str, ca_cert_path: str = None)[source]

Initialize PKS client with certificates

Parameters:

  • wsdl_url – URL to PKS WSDL or local WSDL file

  • client_cert_path – Path to client certificate (PEM)

  • client_key_path – Path to private key (PEM)

  • ca_cert_path – Path to CA certificate for server verification

connect()[source]

Establish SOAP client connection

request_ecu_keys(vin: str, ecu_type: str, ecu_serial: str) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Request ECU keys from Production Key Server

SOAP request example: <soap:Envelope>

<soap:Header>
<wsse:Security>

<wsse:BinarySecurityToken>…</wsse:BinarySecurityToken>

</wsse:Security>

</soap:Header> <soap:Body>

<RequestECUKeys>

<VIN>ABC123…</VIN> <ECUType>EngineControl</ECUType> <ECUSerial>SN12345</ECUSerial>

</RequestECUKeys>

</soap:Body>

</soap:Envelope>

report_key_injection(vin: str, ecu_serial: str, key_id: str, status: str) → bool[source]

Report key injection status back to PKS for audit trail

class pcks_pks_kms.SecureUpdateManager(hsm_manager: HSMManager)[source]

Bases: object

Manages secure ECU updates with cryptographic verification Handles signature verification and secure flashing

__init__(hsm_manager: HSMManager)[source]
prepare_secure_image(firmware_path: str, version: str, ecu_type: str) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Prepare firmware image with secure metadata

verify_secure_image(secure_image: Dict[str, Any]) → bool[source]

Verify signature of secure image before flashing

class pcks_pks_kms.ProductionSecurityGUI(root)[source]

Bases: object

Main GUI application for production security management

__init__(root)[source]
setup_logging()[source]

Configure logging to GUI

setup_menu()[source]

Create menu bar

setup_ui()[source]

Create main UI layout

configure_hsm()[source]

HSM configuration dialog

configure_pks()[source]

Production Key Server configuration dialog

add_ecu_dialog()[source]

Dialog to add ECU configuration

prepare_update_dialog()[source]

Dialog to prepare secure update image

request_keys_threaded()[source]

Request keys from PKS in background thread

inject_keys_threaded()[source]

Inject keys into ECU (simulated)

flash_update_threaded()[source]

Flash secure update image

load_production_order()[source]

Load production order from JSON file

export_audit_log()[source]

Export audit log to file

key_management_dialog()[source]

Key management dialog

generate_report()[source]

Generate comprehensive audit report

load_ecus()[source]

Load ECU configuration from file

remove_ecu()[source]

Remove selected ECU from tree

verify_installation()[source]

Verify ECU installation

show_docs()[source]

Show documentation

show_about()[source]

Show about dialog

process_log_queue()[source]

Process log queue and update GUI

pcks_pks_kms.main()[source]

Main application entry point

Hardware Security Module

class pcks_pks_kms.HSMManager(pkcs11_lib_path: str, slot: int = 0, pin: str = None)[source]

Bases: object

Hardware Security Module (HSM) manager using PKCS#11 Supports key generation, signing, and secure storage

__init__(pkcs11_lib_path: str, slot: int = 0, pin: str = None)[source]

Initialize HSM connection

Parameters:

  • pkcs11_lib_path – Path to PKCS#11 library (.dll, .so, .dylib)

  • slot – HSM slot number

  • pin – User PIN for HSM access

connect() → bool[source]

Establish connection to HSM

disconnect()[source]

Close HSM session

generate_key_pair(key_label: str, key_type: str = 'RSA', key_size: int = 2048) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Generate key pair in HSM

Returns:

Dictionary with key handles and metadata

sign_data(key_label: str, data: bytes, mechanism: Mechanism = <Mechanism.SHA256_RSA_PKCS>) → bytes[source]

Sign data using private key from HSM

get_public_key(key_label: str) → bytes[source]

Retrieve public key from HSM

Production Key Server

class pcks_pks_kms.ProductionKeyServerClient(wsdl_url: str, client_cert_path: str, client_key_path: str, ca_cert_path: str = None)[source]

Bases: object

Client for Production Key Server using SOAP with WS-Security Handles mutual TLS authentication and XML signature

__init__(wsdl_url: str, client_cert_path: str, client_key_path: str, ca_cert_path: str = None)[source]

Initialize PKS client with certificates

Parameters:

  • wsdl_url – URL to PKS WSDL or local WSDL file

  • client_cert_path – Path to client certificate (PEM)

  • client_key_path – Path to private key (PEM)

  • ca_cert_path – Path to CA certificate for server verification

connect()[source]

Establish SOAP client connection

request_ecu_keys(vin: str, ecu_type: str, ecu_serial: str) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Request ECU keys from Production Key Server

SOAP request example: <soap:Envelope>

<soap:Header>
<wsse:Security>

<wsse:BinarySecurityToken>…</wsse:BinarySecurityToken>

</wsse:Security>

</soap:Header> <soap:Body>

<RequestECUKeys>

<VIN>ABC123…</VIN> <ECUType>EngineControl</ECUType> <ECUSerial>SN12345</ECUSerial>

</RequestECUKeys>

</soap:Body>

</soap:Envelope>

report_key_injection(vin: str, ecu_serial: str, key_id: str, status: str) → bool[source]

Report key injection status back to PKS for audit trail
